title: pictographPlus:   Reconstructing Clone-Resolved Transcriptional Programs from  Bulk  Tumor Sequencing
author: Lai, Jiaying
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: R package that integrates bulk DNA and RNA sequencing to  reconstruct clone-specific transcriptomic profiles, infer tumor clonal evolution via a Bayesian hierarchical model, and  identify functional transitions between clones.  Companion software for the manuscript "Reconstructing clone-resolved transcriptional programs from bulk tumor sequencing
steps_raw: R package that integrates bulk DNA and RNA sequencing to  reconstruct clone-specific transcriptomic profiles, infer tumor clonal evolution via a Bayesian hierarchical model, and  identify functional transitions between clones.  Companion software for the manuscript "Reconstructing clone-resolved transcriptional programs from bulk tumor sequencing
